remapKeys.name: Right Alt to Retry Processing + Voice Input
remapKeys.description: Maps Right Alt to execute @RETRY_MANAGER processing and trigger voice input in Cursor IDE
notes: This remap triggers voice input (Ctrl+Shift+V) in Cursor IDE
A separate PowerShell script handles the @RETRY_MANAGER execution
PowerToys Keyboard Manager can remap keys but cannot directly execute scripts
Consider using PowerToys Run (Alt+Space) to trigger the retry script

setup: 4. Map Right Alt to Ctrl+Shift+V (for voice input)
5. Optionally create a shortcut to trigger retry processing
alternative: Since PowerToys Keyboard Manager cannot directly execute scripts:
1. Use PowerToys Run (Alt+Space) to trigger retry script
2. Or create a Windows shortcut and map it to a key
3. Or use PowerToys Shortcut Guide to see available shortcuts
